microsoft builds safe tools

work to fix bugs

ai must be fair
fair for every user
user rights matter most

follow rules strictly now

Section 4
transparency helps everyone

human control stays strong
strong oversight guides choices
choices impact real lives
lives depend on care
care means no harm
harm is never allowed
allowed only safe uses

ethical standards guide us
us we serve well
Section 6
bias gets removed fast
fast removal stops harm
harm from bias ends
ends when we test
test for fairness often
often we find gaps
gaps get filled soon
soon systems are better
better for all groups
groups deserve equal care
Section 7
collaboration brings new ideas
ideas from many sources
sources include outside experts
experts help us learn
learn from past mistakes
mistakes teach us well
well learned lessons help
help us build trust
trust grows with time
time proves our values
Section 8
future holds great hope
hope for safe ai
ai serves human needs
needs are met well
well designed systems last
last for many years
years of progress come
come from ethical choices
choices we make today
today we commit fully
